title: Creation of Subitems from automation limit?

posts.author: AaronR-Enable (Aaron Ripper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community,

Does anyone know if there is a limit to how many subitems you can create from automations in the custom builder if we have a trigger as a status change.

We are building a flow where they might have up to 60 subitems to create but it seems to stick at 18

Thanks

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AaronR-Enable!

I don’t think there is a set limit because we’ve seen automations to create like 90 subitems at a time, but in my experience, the longer an automation is, the longer it takes to work. You could always try breaking it into six different automations that are triggered by the same status change, but have each automation only create 10 subitems or something like that.

Tanner
